title: Burrito Powered Coding...
summary: A YouTube video from Better Stack humorously explores using free AI coding assistance through a Chipotle promotion, with a tongue-in-cheek disclaimer about legality. The video discusses Claude for code generation and AI development practices.
writeup: Better Stack walks through using free AI coding assistance obtained via a Chipotle promotion, framed humorously and paired with a tongue-in-cheek disclaimer about legality. The video covers code generation with Claude and broader AI development practices. The takeaway is a lighthearted look at sourcing LLM coding access through a food promotion rather than a serious workflow guide.
